# GitHub Copilot Token Efficiency Instructions

Apply these instructions for chat, code review, and agent-style work in this repository.

## Communication

- Be concise and direct.
- Answer first, then explain only if needed.
- Avoid filler phrases and repeated context.
- Do not restate the prompt unless clarification is required.
- Prefer short bullets for findings and actions.

## Code Assistance

- Suggest focused changes.
- Avoid rewriting unrelated code.
- Use existing project conventions.
- Prefer minimal examples over large snippets.
- Do not generate boilerplate unless required.

## Review Assistance

- Prioritise bugs, security issues, regressions, and missing tests.
- Keep findings short and actionable.
- Include file/path references when useful.
- Avoid praise-heavy summaries.

## Context Management

- Do not assume every file is relevant.
- Ask for or inspect only needed context.
- Summarise large outputs.
- Avoid repeating generated code that already exists in the repository.
